narrative:
Fairlawn 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 934 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.5 percentage points.
